entries.title:
Outdoor work is established or continued as a lifelong habit. Optional resources are provided in science lessons and on the Alveary bookshelf.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Science: Chemistry, Science: Biology, Science: Physics, Science: Astronomy, Science: Botany, Science: Geology, Science: Microbiology, Science: Food Science, Science: Introduction to Engineering

entries.content: Learners may follow their own interests or follow the plan of their local scouting troop or natural history club.
